## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Checklist

### Minimum Requirements

- [ ] CI passes (format, lint, tests, build, SonarCloud, Lighthouse, CodeQL)
- [ ] New or changed logic has tests (positive, negative, error, edge cases)
- [ ] All new metrics are visible somewhere in the UI (metric transparency rule)
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (README, docs/, AGENTS.md as needed)

### AI Attribution

- [ ] Commits include `Co-Authored-By: Claude ...` or equivalent attribution for any AI-assisted code
- [ ] No AI-generated code was committed without review and testing

### Security & Quality

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials introduced
- [ ] No new inline linter/sonar overrides without explanatory comments
- [ ] API boundaries validate user input; internal paths trust framework guarantees
- [ ] Accessibility: interactive elements are keyboard-navigable and screen-reader labeled
